allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Astro RSS Reader PWA

Static RSS reader built with Astro featuring:
- Feed aggregation from feeds.json, OPML files, and custom user feeds
- Category-based organization with 8 predefined categories
- Client-side search with keyboard shortcuts
- Dark/light theme toggle with system preference support
- PWA with service worker for offline reading
- Netlify functions for scheduled builds and live feed fetching
- Build-time feed caching for fast static generation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
